title: A Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for the Transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Roadmap published via the European Commission setting out recommendations Member States need to implement for a synchronised transition to post-quantum cryptography, with measures to ensure coordination.

title: Commission Recommendation (EU) 2024/1101 on a Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for the transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Official EUR-Lex text of Commission Recommendation (EU) 2024/1101 of 11 April 2024 on a Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for the transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography.

title: EU reinforces its cybersecurity with post-quantum cryptography
summary: European Commission news item presenting post-quantum cryptography, based on encryption methods using complex mathematical problems, as an effective solution to quantum-era security challenges.

title: Commission publishes Recommendation on Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: News announcement of the Commission Recommendation on Post-Quantum Cryptography, encouraging Member States to develop and implement a harmonised approach.

title: Survey - EU Roadmap on Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Commission notice of a stakeholder survey supporting the EU Roadmap on Post-Quantum Cryptography, framed by the cryptographic threats posed by quantum computing.

title: European Commission welcomes G7 cybersecurity declaration to strengthen global digital resilience
summary: Commission news item welcoming a G7 cybersecurity declaration that calls for coordinated action across industry on Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) migration.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography: Current state and quantum mitigation
summary: ENISA study providing an overview of the current state of the standardisation process for Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC).

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography: Anticipating Threats and Preparing the Future
summary: ENISA news item stressing that the transition to post-quantum cryptography does not end with the selection and standardisation of post-quantum algorithms.

title: Engineering Data Protection in the wake of PQC
summary: ENISA webinar discussing the latest developments and considerations on engineering personal data protection in the post-quantum cryptography context.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography - Integration study
summary: ENISA report exploring the necessity to design new cryptographic protocols and integrate post-quantum systems into existing protocols.

title: Solving the cryptography riddle: Post-quantum computing and crypto-assets blockchain puzzles
summary: ENISA news item announcing the release of two cryptography reports, one of them on the progress of post-quantum cryptography standardisation.

title: Cryptographic security: A question for Europe's digital sovereignty
summary: European Parliamentary Research Service briefing on cryptographic security and digital sovereignty, covering international post-quantum cryptography efforts including national PQC standard-selection competitions.

title: Resolution on the EU's Cybersecurity Strategy for the Digital Decade (procedure summary)
summary: Summary of the European Parliament resolution on the EU's Cybersecurity Strategy for the Digital Decade, calling for further research into post-quantum algorithms as a standard for cybersecurity.

title: Quantum technologies: Can they boost the EU's decarbonisation?
summary: European Parliamentary Research Service briefing on quantum technologies that identifies post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as the near-to-medium-term priority, as presented in the Commission's roadmap.

title: Quantum Europe Strategy
summary: The Quantum Europe Strategy (July 2025), which references a cryptography roadmap specifying quantum-safe algorithms alongside quantum communication, sensing and computing objectives. PDF hosted on the Quantum Flagship (qt.eu) site rather than an europa.eu domain.

title: ETSI launches new standard for Quantum-Safe Hybrid Key Exchanges
summary: ETSI press release announcing a new standard for Quantum-Safe Hybrid Key Exchanges to secure future post-quantum encryption.

title: ETSI/IQC Quantum Safe Cryptography Conference 2026
summary: Event page for the ETSI/IQC Quantum Safe Cryptography Conference 2026, covering quantum-safe technologies from post-quantum algorithms and quantum key distribution to hardware security modules.

title: ETSI/IQC conference: Migrate now to post-quantum cryptography!
summary: ETSI press release stating that post-quantum cryptography has become a mature technology and urging awareness-raising on quantum safety and immediate migration.

title: ETSI/IQC Quantum Safe Cryptography Conference 2025
summary: Event page for the ETSI/IQC Quantum Safe Cryptography Conference 2025, featuring sessions on the post-quantum cryptography transition including the QUBIP and PQ-REACT projects.

title: ETSI TC ESI PQC Working Group Terms of Reference
summary: Terms of reference for the ETSI TC ESI PQC working group, whose work covers post-quantum cryptographic signatures and certificates, post-quantum public key infrastructures, and policies for post-quantum transition.

title: NIST PQC: The road ahead
summary: ETSI article featuring NIST mathematician Dustin Moody, who leads NIST's post-quantum cryptography project, on the road ahead for PQC standardisation.

title: Proposal COM(2026) 13 final (targeted amendments including mandatory PQC migration policies)
summary: Commission legislative proposal COM(2026) 13 final providing that Member States should be required to adopt policies for the migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC).

title: Roadmap for lawful and effective access to data for law enforcement
summary: Commission roadmap on lawful and effective access to data for law enforcement, stating that deploying post-quantum cryptography (PQC) solutions and developing quantum key distribution will be crucial to safeguarding data.

title: A European Internal Security Strategy
summary: Commission communication on a European Internal Security Strategy, stating that deploying post-quantum cryptography (PQC) solutions will be crucial to safeguard sensitive communications and data at rest.

title: Commission Communication COM(2024) 81 final
summary: Commission document COM(2024) 81 final describing Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) as a promising approach to make communications and data resistant to quantum attacks.

title: EESC Opinion on the EU's Cybersecurity Strategy (CELEX 52020AE5923)
summary: European Economic and Social Committee opinion noting the need for a transition to quantum-resistant or post-quantum cryptography and referencing the PQC standardisation process.

title: Technology as a new frontier for macroprudential policy (speech)
summary: ECB speech on technology and macroprudential policy noting that the US National Institute of Standards and Technology finalised the first post-quantum encryption standards.

title: One step ahead: protecting the cyber resilience of financial infrastructures (speech)
summary: ECB speech stating that discussing post-quantum cryptography environments within the Euro Cyber Resilience Board will help understand the opportunities and risks for financial infrastructures.

title: Pontes User Requirements Document v0.5
summary: ECB user requirements document for the Pontes initiative requiring post-quantum resilient cryptographic capabilities through crypto-agility mechanisms enabling progressive migration towards standardised post-quantum cryptography.

title: European Payments Stakeholders Group status report (24th ERPB meeting)
summary: Status report by the European Payments Stakeholders Group to the ECB's Euro Retail Payments Board, covering analysis of the announced EC programme for the post-quantum migration of sensitive EU infrastructures and its impact on the banking and payments industry. Industry stakeholder group within an ECB-convened forum, flagged for review.

title: ECSG Status Report on cards standardisation (18th ERPB meeting)
summary: European Cards Stakeholders Group status report on cards standardisation noting NIST's release of the list of post-quantum crypto-algorithms to be standardised against future quantum threats. Industry stakeholder group within an ECB-convened forum, flagged for review.

title: 2nd European Conference on PQC Migration
summary: Conference site for the 2nd European Conference on PQC Migration, addressing questions about the PQC transition with international cybersecurity experts and stakeholders. Organising institution not verifiable from the candidate data, flagged for review.
